incidentSummary: Gateway returned 502 (PAYMENT_5XX) because payments-service deterministically emitted HTTP 500.

rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Payment service logs recorded forced status code 500 and downstream authorization span ended in error while network latency remained normal.

performanceFindings: Error rate increased without corresponding latency spike, consistent with fast-fail 5xx responses.
recommendedActions: Add alerting on PAYMENT_5XX contract code at gateway.
